nodes.label: Audio In
nodes.description: Input audio block (only channel 0 is processed)

nodes.label: Fix to 1 channel
nodes.description: wrap::fix<1> casts to ProcessData<1>, extra channels pass through

nodes.label: Per-sample iteration
nodes.description: FrameProcessor iterates sample-by-sample, loading/storing one float per channel

nodes.label: Serial child processFrame
nodes.description: Children process span<float, 1> one sample at a time
